subcodes.first_line: Before calamity befalleth, one must needs exercise the utmost care and vigilance, and observe diligence in all transactions; but when the matter cometh to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قبل از بلا بايد نهايت احتياط و احتراز نمود و دقّت در معامله کرد ولی چون قضيّه واقع شد
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
